mapper.select: /* M2mUsimMapper.getStatus4SmsTrgtList */ SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.SEND_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') SEND_DATE , B.MBLPHN_NUM , A.ORD_ID , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' AS REQUEST_TIME , B.USR_ID FROM MSP_M2M_ORD_MST A ,CMN_USR_MST B WHERE A.ORD_STATUS = '4' AND A.REGST_ID = B.USR_ID AND A.SEND_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-3,'YYYYMMDD')
